news.t: Transamerica Launches Two Actively Managed ETFs, Expanding Access to Established Large Value and Bond Strategies

holdings.infoBox: TALV is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.18%, Micron Technology at 4.07%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.85%, Amazon.com at 3.50%, and Cisco Systems at 3.00%.

overview.description: The Transamerica Large Value Active ETF (TALV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed equity ETF focused on large-cap US companies. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through a value-oriented approach across multiple sectors TALV was launched on Dec 15, 2025 and is issued by Transamerica.

data.title: Transamerica Launches Two Actively Managed ETFs, Expanding Access to Established Large Value and Bond Strategies
data.text: BALTIMORE, Dec. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Transamerica today announced the introduction of Transamerica Large Value Active ETF (TALV) and Transamerica Bond Active ETF (TABD) on the New York Stock Excha...
